description: The recurring through-line motif: a single glowing outlined figure alone on a field, optionally carrying accumulated trait badges/icons and a label. Recurs every time the narration returns to 'the rarest person so far', accumulating traits; its negation shows a red 'Not'.
whenToUse: Any beat that returns to the person being built ('our rarest human...', 'this person', 'now we give them X'). Use consistently as the spine; keep the figure identical across the video (reuse via carry-over subjectRef).
generalize: The figure is the SAME reused asset (carry-over subjectRef). Slots: the label text, any trait badges to show, whether a red 'Not' negation is present, the field.
produces: reuse the glowing-figure asset as bgUrl (or gpt-image-2 once, then /v1/images/edits to keep it identical); label + any trait badges = gpt-image-2 overlays (word via color-key, badge via rembg) hard-appearing.

label.note: usually 'Rarest Human' (title-bold); or a red 'Not' + 'Rarest Human' for the negation

negation.note: true = a red 'Not' struck over the label (motif overturned)

item.content: trait icon to show on/around the figure

styleLock: The figure + badges are gpt-image-2 art; the label/'Not' are gpt-image-2 lettering (title-bold, red for 'Not'). Reuse the identical figure across the video via carry-over.
rules: Keep the figure IDENTICAL every time (carry-over subjectRef via /v1/images/edits).
Accumulate trait badges as the video adds traits (carry-over motif.traits).
'Not' negation uses semantic red; hard-appear, no animation.
This is the branding anchor — use it as the recurring spine.
